description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a flat, elongated wooden deck with upturned nose and tail, designed for performing tricks and riding on urban surfaces. The deck is covered with a dark, likely black, grip tape for traction, and the edges reveal a natural wood color. Underneath, the skateboard is equipped with two sets of trucks and four small, hard wheels, typical of street skateboards. The wheels are gray and appear to be made of polyurethane, suitable for smooth pavement. The trucks are mounted in a standard configuration and are dark in color, possibly black or gray. There are no visible graphics, logos, or decorative elements on the deck or wheels, giving it a minimalist appearance.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip-taped wooden deck, natural wood edges, and gray wheels mounted on dark trucks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upturned nose, black grip tape, and the front pair of wheels partially visible beneath the deck.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the deck, both sets of wheels, and the upward curves of the nose and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the upturned tail, black grip tape, and the rear pair of wheels beneath the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the deck's length, wheel placement, and the upward curves at both ends.
attribute_wheel_type: street, gray, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, dark color, no visible branding, standard mounting
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
